claims.description: Verify-first: all 4 sites (book-generation.ts, assessments.ts, session-recap.ts, recall-bridge.ts) confirmed to omit ageBracket at origin/main, citing router.ts:908/:1064 (isUnder18AgeBracket gate returns false for undefined). Fixed by threading; the header docblock documents the confirmed premise and the hand-verified red-green receipt.

book-generation.ts (detectSubjectType, generateBookTopics): under-18 subject on the forced legacy path never receives a Gemini/Vertex provider config, on BOTH the primary (getModelConfig) and — via a forced primary-provider failure past MAX_RETRIES — the fallback (getFallbackConfig) selection.

assessments.ts (generateQuickCheck, evaluateAssessmentAnswer, evaluateQuickCheckAnswer, submitAssessmentAnswer) + routes/assessments.ts threading: under-18 subject on the forced legacy path never receives a Gemini/Vertex provider config, on both the primary and (forced primary-provider failure) fallback selection.

session-recap.ts (generateLearnerRecap): under-18 subject (birthYear converted via computeAgeBracketFromDate) on the forced legacy path never receives a Gemini/Vertex provider config, on both the primary and (forced primary-provider failure) fallback selection.

recall-bridge.ts (generateRecallBridge): under-18 subject (ageBracket sourced via getPersonAgeBracket, identity-v2's canonical helper) on the forced legacy path never receives a Gemini/Vertex provider config, on both the primary and (forced primary-provider failure) fallback selection.

Forward ratchet: every LEARNER_FACING_FLOWS routeAndCall/routeAndCallForQuiz/routeAndStream site whose flow: is a string-literal member threads ageBracket, else the test fails naming file:line. Denylist covers 2 open-scope guardian-consumed flow tags (BID-26 entry-gate ratification) and 11 sites deferred to WI-2520 (tracked, not fixed here). Demonstrated red by hand against a scratch non-threading site and against a temporarily-reverted real site; both restored to green.
